q_bank: Tell me about a time when you had to communicate complex ideas to a non-technical team member. How did you approach the situation?
Describe a situation where you worked collaboratively with a team to achieve a common goal. What was your role, and how did you contribute?
How do you handle conflicts with colleagues when you have differing opinions on a project?
Tell me about a time when you took the initiative to lead a project or task. What was the outcome, and what did you learn from the experience?
Describe a situation where you had to work under pressure to meet a tight deadline. How did you manage your time and prioritize tasks?
Tell me about a time when you received feedback that was difficult to hear. How did you respond, and what changes did you make as a result?
Describe a situation where you had to adapt to a significant change in a project or team. How did you handle the transition, and what was the outcome?
What motivates you to continue learning and growing in your career, and how do you set goals for yourself?
Tell me about a time when you recognized a weakness or area for improvement in yourself. What steps did you take to address it, and what was the result?
Describe a situation where you had to make a difficult decision that involved balancing individual and team interests. What was the outcome, and what did you learn from the experience?

history.content: Hello! I am your AI Interviewer for this HR/Behavioral interview. I have prepared 10 questions. Let's begin. Please introduce yourself.
My name is Kartika and I am a passionate engineering student who is studying artificial intelligence.
Tell me about a time when you had to communicate complex ideas to a non-technical team member. How did you approach the situation?
I don't know. I have not come across such a situation.
Tell me about a time when you had to learn something new quickly. How did you approach the learning process, and what did you learn from the experience?
Such a situation occurred during my machine learning project where I had to train a model which is very new for me and I used many AI tools for learning that quickly.
Tell me about a time when you received feedback on your work that was difficult to hear. How did you handle it and what changes did you make as a result?
The question is not clear. Can you help me to explain the question in a simple way?
Tell me about a time when you had to ask for help or clarification on a project. How did you approach the situation, and what did you learn from it?
